html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be planted in the ground.”

-

Sprouting Stone Fruit is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be obtained by mining a Stone Fruit, but the chance of receiving a Sprouting Stone Fruit is fairly low, 1%. Sprouting Stone Fruits can be planted to grow a Stone Fruit Bush, and this Stone Fruit Bush doesn't need to be fertilized.

Trivia

  • Sprouting Stone Fruit was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

–Wolfgang
“Why do you persevere?”
–Wendy
“GROW FASTER AND FEED ME”
–WX-78
“It would be better to allow it to grow at this point.”
–Wickerbottom
“Guess we didn't eat that one in time.”
–Woodie
“How off-putting. It's grown a sprout.”
–Maxwell
“The röck veggie is spröuting.”
–Wigfrid
“Oh wow, it's growing!”
–Webber
“Let's find somewhere to plant this.”
–Warly
“Baby friend needs dirt”
–Wormwood
“We could use more fruit bushes I suppose.”
–Winona
“How it grows, nobody knows.”
–Wortox
“Too little to make fruit yet.”
–Wurt
“Is that tree growing... rocks?”
–Walter
“There's a new little life forming.”
–Wanda
“Can be planted in the ground.”

Sprouting Stone Fruit is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be obtained by mining a Stone Fruit, but the chance of receiving a Sprouting Stone Fruit is fairly low, 1%. Sprouting Stone Fruits can be planted to grow a Stone Fruit Bush, and this Stone Fruit Bush doesn't need to be fertilized.

Sprouting Stone Fruit was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mầm Đá Quả là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể thu được bằng cách khai thác Trái đá, nhưng cơ hội nhận được Trái đá nảy mầm là khá thấp, 1%. Quả Đá Nảy Mầm có thể được trồng để trồng một Bụi Quả Đá và Bụi Quả Đá này không cần phải bón phân.

'''Sprouting Stone Fruit''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be obtained by mining a [[Stone Fruit]], but the chance of receiving a Sprouting Stone Fruit is fairly low, 1%. Sprouting Stone Fruits can be planted to grow a [[Stone Fruit Bush]], and this Stone Fruit Bush doesn't need to be fertilized.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Sprouting Stone Fruit was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update.
